title: Insider Threat & Intellectual Property Theft
description: System detects employee m.patel accessing critical data repositories (M&A details, algorithmic trading models) during off-hours and staging data for USB exfiltration. Potential intellectual property theft by a trusted insider.

alerts.rule_name: DLP - Large File Copy to Removable Drive (USB)

timeline.event: Off-hours login detected for employee m.patel
USB device insertion detected — 1.2 GB of data copied immediately after access
Insider Threat behavioral rule triggered — Case opened
